question: Is the man's head tilted upwards, looking toward the ceiling?
Is the book completely absent from the man's hands?
Is the book visibly tucked into the trench coat pocket or indicated by a realistic bulge in the fabric?
Is one of the man's hands gripping the vertical metal pole?
Is the man standing in an upright, confident pose rather than leaning or slouching?
Is the man's chin visibly lifted, anatomically consistent with an upward gaze?
Are the sunglasses aligned correctly with the upward head tilt (not floating or angled downwards)?
Is the man's identity (facial features, hair style) preserved?
Is the man still wearing the same dark trench coat and sunglasses?
Are the seated passengers on both sides of the subway car unchanged?
Is the digital clock displaying '4:12 PM' unchanged and legible?
Is the subway car interior (seats, windows, ads, lighting fixtures) preserved?
Is the image free from floating artifacts or ghosting remnants of the removed book?
Are the man's hands anatomically correct (no fused fingers or unnatural distortion)?
Is the modified area (head, coat, hands) seamless and consistent in texture/resolution with the rest of the image?
